location: Dropped by club-and-shield Albinaurics found on a fallen bridge section east of the Academy Gate Town grace, heading toward Gate Town Bridge, in Liurnia of the Lakes.
tactics: Several Albinaurics carry it here: two sit on the broken bridge section, a patrolling pair is further along, and one more stands on a low rooftop.
It's a random drop, not guaranteed — expect to clear the group more than once if it doesn't drop.
Individually weak, but they can gang up on the narrow bridge; pull them one at a time if you can.
lore: A hard, crescent-shaped club that Albinaurics carry in place of a curved sword, since not all of them have the coordination to swing a proper blade.

builds.name: Early Quality Filler
builds.why: Cheap Strength/Dexterity requirements and fast strike-type swings make it a passable stopgap hammer while leveling toward a heavier weapon.
